entry.title: New: CR 25-52 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. ADOPTION of Resolution 25-153, to approve for inclusion in the 2026 Hawai‘i State Association of Counties Legislative Package a proposed State bill to: 1) create a new Hawai‘i Revised Statutes chapter for Psychology Interjurisdictional Compact, an interstate compact to facilitate the practice of telepsychology and the temporary in-person practice of psychology across state boundaries; and 2) authorize the state-to-state practice of qualifying psychologists and help reduce regulatory barriers by allowing more psychologists to practice in the state, thus improving access to essential mental health care; and 2. ADOPTION of Resolution 25-154, to approve for inclusion in the 2026 Maui County Council Legislative Package a proposed State bill to: 1) create a new Hawai‘i Revised Statutes chapter for Psychology Interjurisdictional Compact, an interstate compact to facilitate the practice of telepsychology and the temporary in-person practice of psychology across state boundaries; and 2) authorize the state-to-state practice of qualifying psychologists and help reduce regulatory barriers by allowing more psychologists to practice in the state, thus improving access to essential mental health care.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
